Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS NATURAL WONDER COSMETICS LLC, ZHONG FU and ZHI LIU's Motion To Reopen Discovery is To be heard at 9:00am in Dept. 301 on Line 8 of the discovery calendar. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Defendants Natural Wonder Cosmetics Llc, Zhong Fu And Zhi Liu'S Motion To Reopen Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Megan Jeanne, Esq. of The Corporate Law Group, Tel. 650.227.8000, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Qian Sun, Esq. of the Law Offices of Daniel Feder, Tel. 415.391.9476, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was discussed. The court adopted the tentative ruling with modifications: Defendants Natural Wonder Cosmetics LLC, Zhong Fu And Zhi Liu'S Motion To Reopen Discovery is granted. Plaintiff has not submitted any admissible evidence in support of the contention that re-opening discovery would be prejudicial or would result in trial delay. Plaintiff shall respond to previously propounded written discovery by April 23, 2012. Defendants or Plaintiffs may take depositions up to and including May 7, 2012 which is the discovery cut-off in the related Wang matter. Judicial economy suggests that the deposition cut-off here be slightly less than 30 days before the June 4, 2012 trial so that, where appropriate, depositions can be coordinated with the Wang matter. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, nor reported.
